exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your geographic relocation forward
items: Research and document 3-5 potential cities or neighborhoods that meet your relocation criteria
Create a comprehensive relocation timeline with key milestones and deadlines
Calculate and compare the total cost of living between your current location and target destination
Schedule virtual tours or in-person visits to your top 3 target neighborhoods
Research and contact local professionals in your target city (real estate agents, attorneys, accountants)
Document and organize all important records and paperwork needed for your relocation
